base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of zone_palette_variants_catalog — a ui from 1985 super mario bros. Documentation block showing each enemy re-palettized for 4 zones: Overworld / Underground / Castle / Underwater. Not per-frame animation — per-zone color swap at level-load. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Documentation block showing each enemy re-palettized for 4 zones: Overworld / Underground / Castle / Underwater. Not per-frame animation — per-zone color swap at level-load; includes NES hex codes for Nestopia/Nesen/FCEUX emulator palettes
